intro: Syngonanthus anthemidiflorus is a plant species commonly known as "Brazilian peppermint" due to its peppermint-like aroma and flavor. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
